college_info.college_name: Shree Institute Of Technical Education: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for Shree Institute Of Technical Education admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Shree Institute Of Technical Education for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Shree Institute Of Technical Education has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.E. / B.Tech Candidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.
M.E./M.Tech Candidate must have passed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained with the above mentioned marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.
MBA/PGDM Candidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.

faqs.question: Does Shree Institute Of Technical Education has good and experienced faculty?
faqs.answer: Shree Institute Of Technical Education has been rated 3.3 for faculty as per reviews by students. This represents that Institute has decent, qualified and experienced faculty members.

faqs.question: How is the infrastructure at Shree Institute Of Technical Education? What are the facilities available for students?
faqs.answer: Shree Institute Of Technical Education has been rated 3.5 on Infrastructure parameter.

faqs.question: How is the placement facility at Shree Institute Of Technical Education?
faqs.answer: Shree Institute Of Technical Education has been rated 2.3 on placements.

A:    Courses offerred by Shree Institute Of Technical Education are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at Shree Institute Of Technical Education goes up to 462.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: The canteen food is not good, and the fests are not conducted regularly.

review_content.Placements: The placement rate of the 2017-2019 batch is just 30%. The placement percentage is very low compared to other colleges. The college does not provide placements regularly. The highest package offered is 4 LPA, and the average package is 2 LPA. HCL, Genpact, etc., came here. Only 30% of students got internships from our course in Siemens, Bosch, etc., companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is spread over 5 acres of land. Surveillance cameras are installed on the campus for the security and safety of students and staff. It has 2 buildings viz. The main building houses a principal office and administrative office auditorium, AV room, computer labs, classrooms etc. Wi-Fi facility is available. Labs are good with sufficient equipment. Our college has a splendid library, and it is situated in a very big space in the remote corner of the college building. There are many books available for readers, and systems are also provided in our library. Hostel facilities are quite good, and the quality of food is not good in the canteen. Medical facilities are average. The college has a big sports ground with a cricket pitch, volleyball court, basketball court etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely disappointed because of teachers, but the management and chairman are good with us.

review_content.Placements: Placements here are good, and they offered a salary package of more than 3 LPA. Some of the MNCs also visited here for campus interviews, and more than 30% of the students got placed from our college. Our college also conducts special extracurricular activities. Diploma students also did internships, which is a quite good thing.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi facility in our college, but there are labs with more than 200 systems. There are 4 labs, and every classroom is under CCTV surveillance. So, they monitor us when they see the footage randomly. There is no hostel facility in our college, and weekly once, there is a spots period. The quality of the food served is average. Our college is spread over 30 acres.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied because of management and placements. But we had good teachers.

review_content.Placements: It was an average college, and no placements were offered when I was passed out. I think there was a placement for a BPO company which offered a salary of Rs. 10,000 per month to Rs. 15,000 per month to freshers. I don't remember the name of the company which visite the college for placements because it was a very small company and I don't think it's still running. Being a mechanical engineer was not easy in this college, because there was no placement offered for us. None of the students got selected for an internship from the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was good. Wi-Fi was average, and the library was good. The college canteen was very bad. The college did not provide hostel facilities. But it was a little better in sports when compared to studies. They provide good facilities for cricket which was the only good thing about our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: The faculty members are good but neglect students.

review_content.Placements: 10% of students got placed. The placements for mechanical students are not good. Students are not interested in studying because there are no good teachers.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs and libraries are available but not good. Hostels are not available. Sports are not available in our college. It is a waste because many students like games and sports, but there are no facilities. Food and hostels are not good and comfortable.
review_content.Faculty: The faculty members are good but neglect students. Students are not made industry-ready. The pass percentage is 1%. The management is not good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Good choice to study here.

review_content.Placements: There was no placement when I was in college and internship also.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is good and classrooms are neat and spacious. But there is no Wi-Fi facility for students. Library is very spacious and good to get knowledge. There is no hostel in our college when I was studying. Labs are good. They conducted sports and games also.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful and qualified. They taught us everything about the subject. They do not make students ready for industry. Teachers in this college shares good knowledge to students. If we have any doubt about the subject, teacher freely comes to us and clarifies the doubts.

faqs.answer: Shree Institute Of Technical Education is a reputed institute for B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Shree Institute Of Technical Education has a review rating of 3 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 2.5 on campuslife, 2.3 on placements, 3.3 on faculty and 3.5 on Infrastructure.

faqs.answer: Shree Institute Of Technical Education has courses such as B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM which are primarily in the stream of Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Shree Institute Of Technical Education has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Structural Engineering, Power Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, VLSI Design.

admission_process.title: Shree Institute Of Technical Education Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Shree Institute Of Technical Education admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Shree Institute Of Technical Educationoffers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 1,40,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

Some of the popular ones are Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering and Computer Science Engineering. There are a total of210seats available for this programme.

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with college, teachers, infrastructure and practice labs.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not better in our college, but the overall college environment and surrounding are better. Companies recruit students with a good salary package.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is huge in the village, and there is no disturbance. Fees are also reasonable, i.e., only Rs. 30,000 per semester which is worthy. There are smart classrooms which are equipped and fully digital, and there is a good Wi-Fi connection. Hostels are inbuilt in college, so students don't have to travel. There is a good library which is open 24 hours for students with a well-maintained computer lab and all the necessary books.

reviews_list.review_title: Best college for students.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 45 percent placement done from campus and in a good packages also given to student because it is situated near gurugram where many companies available. Student get approximately 10 Lacs annual package and much more so here placement is good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is best of this college if someone SEE it then he can not forget it. Its whole campus is fully Wi-Fi and many labs for student for practice and good and clean classroom and good collection of book in libaray. It has a good hostel facility having good food and all facility for the student he need.

faqs.question: How can I get into Yaduvanshi College of Engineering and Technology, Haryana for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Yaduvanshi College of Engineering and Technology, Haryana has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed 10+2 examination from recognised Board/University with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one of the following subjects: Chemistry/Bio-Technology/Biology/Technical Vocational subject/Computer Science/Information Technology/Informatics Practices/Agriculture/Engineering Graphics/Business Studies. 
Candidate must have obtained at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidate belonging to reserved category) in the above subjects taken together.
OR 
Candidate must have passed Diploma (in Engineering and Technology) examination with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates belonging to reserved category).

college_info.college_name: Dravidian University

highlights.summary:
The AP ICET 2026 application window will now remain active until Mar 23, 2026, without a late fee for Dravidian University admission to the MBA/PGDM course. Further, the AP ICET exam 2026 will be held on May 2, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and B.Com. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Dravidian University offers MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and MCA. The fees for Dravidian University courses range between INR 9,000 to 1,80,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Dravidian University offers MBA and MCA courses based on APICET scores. With 60 and 70 percentile in 10th and 12th, it is easily possible to get into Dravidian University. Although, there is no such criteria to attain a specific percentage. However, it is mandatory for the candidates to do complete their UG degree with 50% passing marks in any discipline from the UGC recognised university. For more detailed-wise eligibility criteria, candidates need to check out below:As per the APICET eligibility criteria 2025 candidates seeking admission to the MBA programme should have studied and passed the three- or four-year degree course in any discipline conducted by the university or recognised by University Grants Commission (UGC).Candidates with aggregate marks of 50% (45% in the case of reserved categories – SC, ST and BC) are alone eligible to take admission through APICET. The qualifying Degree obtained by the Distance Mode Program should be recognised by the Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE, and DEC/DEB. The candidates who are appearing for the final year degree examination shall also be eligible to appear for Andhra Pradesh ICET-2025.
faqs.question: Can I get into Dravidian University if I have scored just 60% in 10th and 70% in 12th?

faqs.answer: A:    In 2024, as per the APICET cutoff, the minimum rank to get admission at Vignan's Institute of Information Technology for MBA course stood at 34287 for the General Home State category candidates. fee_structure.overview: The AP ICET 2026 application window will now remain active until Mar 23, 2026, without a late fee for Dravidian University admission to the MBA/PGDM course. Further, the AP ICET exam 2026 will be held on May 2, 2026.

faqs.answer: Dravidian University offers MBA and MCA courses based on APICET scores. With 60 and 70 percentile in 10th and 12th, it is easily possible to get into Dravidian University. Although, there is no such criteria to attain a specific percentage. However, it is mandatory for the candidates to do complete their UG degree with 50% passing marks in any discipline from the UGC recognised university. For more detailed-wise eligibility criteria, candidates need to check out below:As per the APICET eligibility criteria 2025 candidates seeking admission to the MBA programme should have studied and passed the three- or four-year degree course in any discipline conducted by the university or recognised by University Grants Commission (UGC).Candidates with aggregate marks of 50% (45% in the case of reserved categories – SC, ST and BC) are alone eligible to take admission through APICET. The qualifying Degree obtained by the Distance Mode Program should be recognised by the Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE, and DEC/DEB. The candidates who are appearing for the final year degree examination shall also be eligible to appear for Andhra Pradesh ICET-2025.

The qualifying Degree obtained by the Distance Mode Program should be recognised by the Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE, and DEC/DEB. The candidates who are appearing for the final year degree examination shall also be eligible to appear for Andhra Pradesh ICET-2025.

review_summary.college_name: Dravidian University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and talented professors.

content.Placements: The university does not have a placements cell, but the management is bringing in some startup companies and conducting job campaigns, especially for teaching positions. There is talk that a campus placements cell will be established soon.
content.Infrastructure: The university campus and library have beautiful gardening that adds to the official and beautiful look of the university. Our lab is well constructed with fully functioning systems for the students. Hostel rooms are very good compared to other government university hostels. The food is typically Chennai style, which took me months to get used to. Except for the curries, all the breakfast foods like idly, puri, and chapathi are delicious, just like restaurant food. We have NCC here in the university, and there are many sports events.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: A review about Dravidian University.

content.Placements: This college has a good base for the MCA students. It provides a good placements rate. It provides multiple placement drives until students get placed (if the students are good at academics). 70% students get placed from this course. The highest package offered was 45 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a dedicated floor block for each department along with various laboratories available in the campus. A canteen is provided having a good ambience and serving tasty food. Quality of the infrastructure is good. The surroundings of the campus are neat and clean and managed everyday.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure and placements are good.

content.Placements: The placements scenario is good. Companies such as Microsoft, Google, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, HDFC, TCS, etc. visit our college for placements. Remaining people are interested in higher studies; if you are capable, you will get a good core job with an awesome package.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, a library with a huge collection of books, swimming pool, grass court for football, gym, etc. The college has good Wi-Fi facility and classrooms are also good. The hostel facility has good canteen, but food is somewhat average.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physical Education (B.P.Ed.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: When you want to live peacefully with education just join this university blindly.

content.Placements: In our course, 50% of students join the course. In any course average. The basic pay is 15k. This is a government organised university. Low placements are done. One will gain unlimited knowledge in the university.
content.Infrastructure: This hostel was maintained by university students. Some contractor laborers also helped in mess maintenance. We come out for food it was comfortable with the local people. New personalities of the area they will take to adjust for food, need not worry Kuppam is a near city at university.
content.Faculty: Everyone is regular staff so we need not worry. Technology is also used at the maximum level thanks to the corona pandemic is increasing technology adaptation. After completing this course you are eligible for to write government jobs. The average percentage is 90.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It has very good infrastructure, but I am dissatisfied with sports and academic dean office.

content.Placements: Almost 50% of the students took admission in our college. There is an issue as there is no campus in our college. Our college fee is Rs 12,500, but the government approved Rs. 25,000 for both self and regular students. There are no job offers on our campus. There are no offers from IT companies to recruit students. Our college does not even provide placements and internships for students.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of our course are very good and attractive. The library is very good and huge, with many books. They issue an ID card to take books to the hostel. Our college hostel is very good with 24x7 water, current and Wi-Fi facilities. Quality of food is good because it is a student management hostel. Canteen is not good, but medical facilities are also not bad. They give very less priority for sports and games.

hostel.description:
There are separate Hostels for men and women on the Dravidian University Campus. All women students will be provided with accommodation. There is limited accommodation for men, and Both men & women hostels equipped with Wifi facility 

All the students hailing from more than 20 k.m. radius of Dravidian University are eligible for Hostel Accommodation. However, admission will be given depending upon the distance of their hometown and based on the availability of accommodation.

library.description:
The library has a large collection of 76 thousand volumes, in various subjects, are very useful to all users in general and for the researchers of the Dravidian languages in particular.In order to achieve functional efficiency, the library is organized into different sections. They are circulation section, Periodical section, Technical section, Textbook collection, Reference Section, Quick Reference Section, Digital Library, Automation and Reprographic service etc. 

The library has 4 reading halls with seating capacity of 180 users at a time. The library follows open access system. Dewey Decimal Classification Scheme and Anglo American Cataloguing Rules – II are following for classification and cataloguing respectively. OPAC searching facility is also available in the Library. 

Books(Includes all Dravidian language books): 84,400
Journals: 97
Magazines:47
News papers: 18
Thousands of electronic collection of journals/magazines are present in the library.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Hockey, Volley Ball, Table Tennis, Athletics, Weight Lifting, Wrestling, Boxing, Gymnastics, Shooting

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and talented professors.
reviews.review_text: The university campus and library have beautiful gardening that adds to the official and beautiful look of the university. Our lab is well constructed with fully functioning systems for the students. Hostel rooms are very good compared to other government university hostels. The food is typically Chennai style, which took me months to get used to. Except for the curries, all the breakfast foods like idly, puri, and chapathi are delicious, just like restaurant food. We have NCC here in the univer...

reviews.review_heading: A review about Dravidian University.
reviews.review_text: The college has a dedicated floor block for each department along with various laboratories available in the campus. A canteen is provided having a good ambience and serving tasty food. Quality of the infrastructure is good. The surroundings of the campus are neat and clean and managed everyday.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and placements are good.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, a library with a huge collection of books, swimming pool, grass court for football, gym, etc. The college has good Wi-Fi facility and classrooms are also good. The hostel facility has good canteen, but food is somewhat average.

reviews.review_heading: When you want to live peacefully with education just join this university blindly.
reviews.review_text: This hostel was maintained by university students. Some contractor laborers also helped in mess maintenance. We come out for food it was comfortable with the local people. New personalities of the area they will take to adjust for food, need not worry Kuppam is a near city at university.

reviews.review_heading: It has very good infrastructure, but I am dissatisfied with sports and academic dean office.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our course are very good and attractive. The library is very good and huge, with many books. They issue an ID card to take books to the hostel. Our college hostel is very good with 24x7 water, current and Wi-Fi facilities. Quality of food is good because it is a student management hostel. Canteen is not good, but medical facilities are also not bad. They give very less priority for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good university but I am dissatisfied with the faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infra is good but not properly managed by the students and faculty. Labs, Wi-Fi, library, etc. are there but they are of no use as there is no proper guidance.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: We can have a wonderful experience at this college and focus on our desired goals.

review_content.Placements: Almost 70-80% of students got placed in this course. Top recruiting companies were TCS, Wipro, and Tech Mahindra. Top roles offered were full-stack developer, web developer, support engineer, and software engineer. The highest salary package offered was 10 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 2.4 LPA. Around 80-90% of students got internships in this course.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members were cooperative, knowledgeable, and helpful. The course curriculum was relevant to make students ready for the industry. Teachers always clarify our doubts. The course curriculum needed to be updated with B.Tech in electrical, diploma in mechanical, and electrical engineering. Teachers also provided study materials during exams.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with campus placements but faculty members are good and campus life is excellent.

review_content.Placements: In our college, almost 70% of students were placed in the previous year. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Tata, Deloitte, Cognizant, etc., visit our campus. There are no internships provided. Top roles offered are network engineer, customer services, and trainee engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are inadequate because the available systems are very old and have few processors. In labs, there are no new systems. Each class can accommodate 60 students and has a projector. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. The library is available. The hostel facilities are good. Rooms have the option of sharing. The food served in the mess is excellent, with different menus every day. The canteen food has an average taste. The medical facilities are not available. Sports facilities are good.

individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the college till now .

content.Placements: Some students get placement, not all of them. The lower package on average is around 1.5 Lacs per annum, and the highest is 6 Lacs per annum. We have to do internships by ourselves, and there is one credit for it in my current year. The top roles are in the IT sector.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: RCVS College of Engineering (RVSCET) offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech. On the other hand, at the PG level, the RCVS College of Engineering (RVSCET) offers M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fees for RCVS College of Engineering (RVSCET) courses range between INR 35,000 to 2,00,000.

Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor's degree of minimum 3 years duration with minimum 50% (45 % for reserved category). The qualifying degree examination can be 10+2+3/4/5 years pattern or 10+3 years Diploma +3 years pattern or B.E./B.Tech./B.Arch./B.Pharm. or 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field. Candidates admitted through Lateral Entry in degree courses are not eligible. Candidates with degree obtained without studying 10th/12th Std. or 3 years degree programme are not eligible. Candidates appearing for the final semester/year are also eligible.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. or equivalent in relevant stream. Candidate belonging to reserved category must have 45% in qualifying examination. Candidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE

Final year students can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates must have valid GATE score.

Candidates must have passed Bachelor's degree of minimum of 3 years duration examination or equivalent and obtained an aggregate minimum of 50% marks (45% of marks in case of SC, ST and Category-I of Karnataka candidates).
Final year students can also apply on provisional basis.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: What is the actual truth of GIST, Rayagada?

review_content.Placements: The campus does have a placement cell, and it was not so active. The placement for electrical students was very limited. Some of the students got placed in the local small companies. Remaining students tried to crack some other Government exams for a better job and future. There was no highest package or the lowest package. There is just a median package, which is around 3-4 LPA. Internships are also very rare here.
review_content.Infrastructure: The Infrastructure here was average. The classes were basic, and the labs were limited to students in each branch. The library had a good number of books, and the Wi-Fi was very limited here. The hostel rooms were kind of okay. Each room should be shared by 2-3 students. The security here was also very much basic. The quality of food was acceptable here.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: What is the actual truth of GIST, Rayagada?

content.Placements: The campus does have a placement cell, and it was not so active. The placement for electrical students was very limited. Some of the students got placed in the local small companies. Remaining students tried to crack some other Government exams for a better job and future. There was no highest package or the lowest package. There is just a median package, which is around 3-4 LPA. Internships are also very rare here.
content.Infrastructure: The Infrastructure here was average. The classes were basic, and the labs were limited to students in each branch. The library had a good number of books, and the Wi-Fi was very limited here. The hostel rooms were kind of okay. Each room should be shared by 2-3 students. The security here was also very much basic. The quality of food was acceptable here.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Gnyana Saraswati College of Engineering and Technology offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech and After 10th Diploma. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Gnyana Saraswati College of Engineering and Technology fee structure ranges between INR 44,700 to 2,55,200.

faqs.answer:
A:    Gnyana Saraswati College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityMBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed Bachelor Degree (BA / B.Com/ B.Sc/ BBA / BBM / BCA / BE / B. Tech / B. Pharmacy / Any 3 or 4 year Degree except Oriental Languages). Examinations of minimum three years duration with the mentioned marks (45 % marks in BC Category ) in aggregate from a recognized Institute/ University.
The qualifying degree obtained by the Distance Mode Program/ Open Distance Learning (ODL) should have recognition by the Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB as per UGC Regulations of 2013.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.
The minimum age of the candidates should be 19 years as on the date of notification (Candidates whose date of Birth up to 30th MARCH, 2004). No maximum age limit.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognized as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh.

Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th class from any recognised Board/Council.

faqs.answer: A:    Gnyana Saraswati College of Engineering and Technology has courses such as MBA/PGDM, B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, After 1th Diploma which are primarily in the stream of Business & Management Studies, Engineering. Gnyana Saraswati College of Engineering and Technology has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, After 10th Diploma specializations in Electrical Engineering.

review_content.Placements: There were placements offers by major IT companies Like IBM, Wipro and no internships from the college end. Our seniors from B.Tech have been placed at IBM. Nearly 25 students has been placed there once they got their pass results. Wipro, Google and some IT companies have their major hand in placements. Students who secured 60% marks have secured a place in placements. Since the last two years, there were no proper placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: It is quite OK. The lab and classrooms are enough good but the maintenance ruined the quality. Sports and games are conducted occasionally. There is no Wi-Fi facility in the college and we move to the canteen. It is a total mess and nothing will be available there. You should travel one and a half kilometres to have tea and samosa. No college-managed hostel is available.

college_info.intro:
Sant Gahira Guru Vishwavidyalaya has a comprehensive collection of courses for students to choose from. The various courses at SGGV Ambikapur are offered through the 7 faculty-departments at the university. Sought-after courses include BEd, BA, MA, MSc, among others. SGGV also offers plenty of Law courses like LLB and LLM, among others. The various departments that offer various courses and specializations at SGGV are listed below:
Department of Farm Forestry
Department of BioTechnology
Department of Environmental Science
Department of Pharmacy
Department of Functional Hindi
Department of Computer Science

review_content.General: Students who score a minimum of 50% can take admission to our college. The salary package is around 3.5 LPA. Many placements are conducted, and people from outside the country come here and provide information. Several companies visit the college and offer internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are not available in our college, so students have to rent rooms and live in them. The college has Wi-Fi, labs, a library, and well-equipped rooms. Many sports are played, and several students are selected for national and international competitions.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college is very good being located in a rural area.

review_content.Placements: There are no packages offered in our college because our college only provides graduation and post graduation degrees. If anyone wants to join the college, they just have to pay the fee amount and get enrolled. The college is a private college. Course like D.Ed. and B.Ed. will be introduced soon.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no boys hostel, they just have a girls hostel provided. For girls, there are two hostels available out of which they can make a choice. The facilities provided in the labs are good. The library is good and it is not really big, but there are many books available including course books along with department-wise books sections being available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It's a pretty good college, but it's a little low in standards.

review_content.Placements: A good number of students study here. There are no placements after B.Sc. No one got the internship. You can study further after obtaining a B.Sc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The labs are good with good facilities, but the classrooms are a little bit dim. Lights don't work often. The library is also kind of dim. The hostel facilities are not that great. Hostel workers are really rude and they scold without any reason every time. Phones are submitted after 8 o'clock. There is no social life available.
review_content.Faculty: Some teachers help and some don't. Some are knowledgeable. Many teachers are young and don't have any experience. The course makes students industry-ready. Students have to study well for an exam. It's a bit difficult, but they can get a good percentage if they study well.

overview_faqs.question: How has your experience at SGGV influenced your personal growth?
overview_faqs.answer: Sant Gahira Guru Vishwavidyalaya is committed to encouraging the all-round development of students. The popular courses include BEd, BSc, MA, MSc, LLM, and others. individual_reviews.title: I recommend this college because of its facilities, infrastructure, and some faculty members.

content.Placements: This college never offered placement because at that time the world was suffering from the pandemic COVID-19. So that time never got placements. But, in recent times, they have changed its name and medium of study. At the present time, the college name is Swami Atmanand English Medium College, Ambikapur, and offers many other courses. I would rate the facilities of the college as one of the best in Ambikapur, but the teachers are less experienced and have poor knowledge. Overall, it is a good institute.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is one of the best in across Ambikapur. Facilities are one of the best but hostel facilities are not open properly because only one hostel is situated around the college. I don't know if it is a boy's hostel or girls' hostel but I think that is not too good in terms of infrastructure and front of that building looks like an old building.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to D.Pharma at Sarguja University?
faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for a Diploma in Pharmacy offered by Sarguja University, candidates must have passed class 12 exams with Mathematics, Biology as main subjects with minimum second division. The Sarguja University Diploma courses offer Diploma in Pharmacy to students who pass the qualifying exam. Those who qualify will be able to take admission to the course on merit basis. No entrance test is required.

faqs.question: How to reach SGGV Ambikapur?
faqs.answer: Students enrolled into SGGV can arrive atBirsa Munda Airport, Ranchiand take a few hours' drive to reach the campus of SGGV. AlthoughAmbikapur City Airportis functioning, it may not receive major flights as of now. The closest railway station to the campus isAmbikapurStation, which is around a 15-20-minute drive away from the campus of Sant Gahira Guru Vishwavidyalaya.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by Sarguja University for admission to BCA?
faqs.answer: Admission in the saguja university is based on the merit score of previous qualifying exam. They accept candidates for BCA admission on their performance in. 12th standard exams or through entrance test. You have to score typically minimum 45 to 50 % marks with mathematics from a recognised board. It's admission process is offline

review_content.General: The department consists of 3 labs. It also contains digital and also normal central libraries. Our college also had digital classrooms, and the campus has Wi-Fi facility. The quality of the hostel is moderate, and the food served is also average. Sports facilities provided on the campus are very good. There are a lot of grounds for students to play and empower their potential.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is average in terms of studying, but other things will be better.

review_content.Placements: I am from the mechanical branch. In our college, students who have about 70% of marks in academics will join. The highest salary offered here is around Rs. 25,000 per month, while the lowest salary offered would be Rs. 15,000 per month which we need. Only some reputed companies will visit our college for placements, and they offered assistant engineer roles. The highest salary package offered will be 3 LPA and the lowest salary package offered will be 1.8 LPA. Students who have above 65% of marks in academics will get internships from our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided in our college are average as there is only a minimum number of all things. Our college has Wi-Fi hotspot, but it provides a minimum internet. There are only average lab facilities as they provide less things in the labs. Our college is good at providing sports and equipment, and we all like to play sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2020

review_summary.college_name: Nalanda Institute of Engineering & Technology (NIET, Guntur) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied because of the placements as very few students are selected.

content.Placements: Only a few students were selected in the campus placements. Around 25% of the students got jobs from college. We didn't have any top companies for campus placements, but students were very talented, and they can get very good jobs. Companies that visited the campus for recruitment were startup companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was good. Food served in the hostel food was not good for students. Faculty members took care of any issues in the college and hostel. We had good labs. Students can study well because of the campus as it is very pleasant. We have a big cricket ground, volleyball court, basketball court. Students can play any game in college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is a moderate campus to study.

content.Placements: About 40% of the students will get placed from our college. The highest salary package offered will be around 3.6 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered would be 1.5 LPA. The average salary package offered would be 2 LPA. The top recruiting company for our college is TCS. The top role offered is a developer. Only 3%-4% of the students got internships in companies.
content.Infrastructure: The department consists of 3 labs. It also contains digital and also normal central libraries. Our college also had digital classrooms, and the campus has Wi-Fi facility. The quality of the hostel is moderate, and the food served is also average. Sports facilities provided on the campus are very good. There are a lot of grounds for students to play and empower their potential.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Our college is average in terms of studying, but other things will be better.

content.Placements: I am from the mechanical branch. In our college, students who have about 70% of marks in academics will join. The highest salary offered here is around Rs. 25,000 per month, while the lowest salary offered would be Rs. 15,000 per month which we need. Only some reputed companies will visit our college for placements, and they offered assistant engineer roles. The highest salary package offered will be 3 LPA and the lowest salary package offered will be 1.8 LPA. Students who have above 65% of marks in academics will get internships from our college.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided in our college are average as there is only a minimum number of all things. Our college has Wi-Fi hotspot, but it provides a minimum internet. There are only average lab facilities as they provide less things in the labs. Our college is good at providing sports and equipment, and we all like to play sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied with the college.

content.Placements: It is a waste as there are no placements provided by the college. Even if any company visits the college, it is not a high company. During the time of admission, they promised to place everybody, but they are not offering placement in good companies. Even they are giving money if someones get admission to the college. It is better to not to look at this college.
content.Infrastructure: There are no updated books in the library, and neither sports nor cultural activities are organised by the college. Hostel is the worst. Food served is also not good. We celebrated only three parties in the entire B.Tech life. So don't spoil your life.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the faculty. There are no placements. The management is poor.

content.Placements: Hardly one or two companies visit the campus for placements and especially those are paid drives. I am not sure about the offer letters who are selected in those drives. This year, only 3 companies visited the campus for placements. The salary package offered is very low. The salary offered is around Rs. 10,000 per month. So it is better to attend off-campus placement drives.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is not that good. The canteen and hostel facilities are very bad. Lots of playgrounds are available here. The computer lab is somewhat good. The food served is not good. However, we can enjoy the campus atmosphere. There is a Wi-Fi facility. Classrooms are good.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Nalanda Institute of Engineering & Technology (NIET, Guntur) for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Nalanda Institute of Engineering & Technology (NIET, Guntur) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognized as equivalent there to, from a recognized Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).
There is no upper age limit.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream of engineering and technology and secure the above-mentioned minimum percentage (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto.

reviews.review_heading: This is an average college.

No special importance is given to sports, and one can play any sports of their interest. I lived in the hostel during my firs...

reviews.review_heading: The way of teaching is average, and I'm not satisfied with placements in 2017.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Classrooms and labs are good. The digital classroom is not good, and the sound system is not working in the digital classroom. reviews.review_heading: The college is average for the people who got rank under 1 lakh in EAMCET.
reviews.review_text: Outside of the college is good, but the interior is bad. The computer labs are worst. There is a playground facility, but our physical director will not take us to ground and will not make us learn how to play the game, but that person will check whether all the students are wearing a proper uniform or not.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty and placements are good in the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good. My college couldn't provide the Wi-Fi facility. My college labs were equipped with good systems. Particularly the climate was good in the classrooms. The quality of food in my college was average. The hostel rooms were very good. Previously, the faculty were somewhat better.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in Guntur.
reviews.review_text: About the infrastructure, it is very good. The labs are very good, where they maintain the labs without AC, and the labs are best in the infrastructure compared to the surrounding colleges. The college management is also very good and is down to earth, and they mingle with the students. The college is very good, and the environment of the college is very good. All the blocks have their names, and they are named after well-known persons.

reviews.review_heading: Please read this review before you join this college.
reviews.review_text: The college classrooms are always neat and clean. Sufficient fans and lighting are there in the classrooms. Bathrooms are also clean. There is no availability of mineral water. Canteen, bakery and stationery shops are available. The canteen food is available at normal prices. The stationery shop is small, but you can get all the required items. There is a cricket ground and also a basketball court on the campus. They don't provide any sports items to play. Though PT is available, he doesn't trai...

reviews.review_heading: My college climate was good. Its facilities are also better.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities in this college. There is a good climatic condition. I played the sports and games like basketball, volleyball and the kabaddi team was good. My college was good at all games. I enjoyed playing all the games. All the students participate.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There is a good infrastructure with gardens and a good library. There is no Wi-Fi facility. The classrooms are cleaned regularly. A sports period is allocated to separate branches one day, every week. The hostel rooms are only for reserved category candidates. Every year, a fest is celebrated in which other colleges come and participate.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of placements, infrastructure, and digital library
reviews.review_text:
NIET campus has the facilities of digital classrooms, digital library, central library, volleyball court, and a large playground.
I have completed my B.Tech in electronics and communication engineering department.
Coming to ECE labs, they are not digitalized.
Analog systems are used.
No AC support in the labs.
The food quality is not bad.

reviews.review_heading: I feel dissatisfied to complete my education in this college. It is the worst.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi on the campus. There are some labs in the first year which are fine but from the second year to the fourth year, there is not even one lab that works properly. Classrooms are spacious for teaching but there are no faculty members for teaching classes. There is one room for medical facilities (a dispensary) which is always closed. It is built for the university norms purpose. From the college side, there is an encouragement for sports and there are two good PDs.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Caarmel College Of Engineering.

review_content.Placements: There is a well organised and managed placement cell working in the campus. During my college years from 2012-2016 every year they have conducted job fairs and campus interviews a lot of my batchmates as well as my seniors got placed on different well reputed companies around India. A GOOD SALARY PACKAGE WAS ALSO ENSURED.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is situated in a beautiful peaceful locality. Plenty of facilities including Wi-Fi and good network coverage. The campus is well equipied with great infrastructure include good lab facilities for all departments. And canteen and hostel facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: If you have the ability to learn yourself and looking for just a degree, you can try this college

review_content.Placements: For core branches like mechanical, civil and EEE, there is no placement drive. Very few companies come to college for placement and for CS and IT branches, the college provides some off-campus drives. The college gives less importance to placements. In my batch, no one got placed, and in all branches, maximum 20 might have got placements out of 400 students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Even though the college is in a remote place, the management is trying to make the infrastructure better. During my final year, so many plans were proposed and some of them had been done. The college labs, classrooms and the library are good and they will meet up with the standards. The ground, the canteen and the hostel are maintained well. When I joined the college, the condition was worse but gradually, they made it in good condition. For infrastructure and all other facilities, I can give a rating of 2.5 out of 5.

review_summary.college_name: Believers Church Caarmel Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: The college is awesome, but some students will dissatisfy due to some of the management policies.

content.Placements: Caarmel Engineering College has an active placement cell. They organize campus recruitment programme yearly. Most of the participating institutions are IT based companies, they need software developers and programming associates. College has an active IEEE students branch, which co-ordinates the recruitment procedure. From the last 3 years, we can conclude that the rate of students participating in the campus recruitments is decreased. The main reason is due to the bond/agreement which was put forward by the recruiting company. The another reason for the above mentioned problem is that the lack of core institutions, because the students from departments other than software based are not willing to work as a software developers.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Review of Caarmel College Of Engineering.

content.Placements: There is a well organised and managed placement cell working in the campus. During my college years from 2012-2016 every year they have conducted job fairs and campus interviews a lot of my batchmates as well as my seniors got placed on different well reputed companies around India. A GOOD SALARY PACKAGE WAS ALSO ENSURED.
content.Infrastructure: The college is situated in a beautiful peaceful locality. Plenty of facilities including Wi-Fi and good network coverage. The campus is well equipied with great infrastructure include good lab facilities for all departments. And canteen and hostel facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: If you have the ability to learn yourself and looking for just a degree, you can try this college

content.Placements: For core branches like mechanical, civil and EEE, there is no placement drive. Very few companies come to college for placement and for CS and IT branches, the college provides some off-campus drives. The college gives less importance to placements. In my batch, no one got placed, and in all branches, maximum 20 might have got placements out of 400 students.
content.Infrastructure: Even though the college is in a remote place, the management is trying to make the infrastructure better. During my final year, so many plans were proposed and some of them had been done. The college labs, classrooms and the library are good and they will meet up with the standards. The ground, the canteen and the hostel are maintained well. When I joined the college, the condition was worse but gradually, they made it in good condition. For infrastructure and all other facilities, I can give a rating of 2.5 out of 5.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2014

content.Other: Carmel Engineering College is an awesome college with best known for its scenic beauty. This college is located on Perunadu Ranni on a hilly area. So from the college we can see a very good scenic beauty. The college comes with very good faculties and Teachers. Now the college has got a new very good hygienic Canteen. The lab also has very good equipment’s. Overall it’s a very good college.

admission_process.title: Believers Church Caarmel Engineering College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Believers Church Caarmel Engineering College admission 2025 is based on merit or entrance exam scores. The institute considers scores in XAT, CMAT, and KEAM, etc. for admission. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in several specialisations.Believers Church Caarmel Engineering Collegeoffers B.E. / B.Tech at UG level and M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM at the PG level.
Aspirants who are selected for admission need to pay the course fees. The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 1,50,000 - 2,00,000. Aspirants have to payINR 1,80,000for PG courses.
